name: Pachmarhi (Queen of Satpura)
description: The only hill station in Madhya Pradesh, Pachmarhi is a lush green landscape of waterfalls, ancient caves, and stunning sunrise viewpoints in the Satpura Range.
history: Discovered by Captain James Forsyth in 1857. Legend says the Pandavas built the five caves here during their exile.
famousFor: Waterfalls (Bee Falls), Dhupgarh (highest point), and Pandava Caves.
